name: Claude Fable 5
tagline: First widely-released Mythos-class model; 1M context, 128K max output, $10/$50 per MTok.
metaDescription: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic), released 2026-06-09 — part of the Claude Fable / Mythos (Mythos-class) line. First widely-released Mythos-class model; 1M context,…
overview: Claude Fable 5 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Fable / Mythos (Mythos-class) line. Released 2026-06-09. Anthropic's most capable, top-end tier — a higher intelligence class than Opus, released publicly as Fable 5 with safety classifiers and to restricted partners as Mythos 5.

What's notable in this version: First widely-released Mythos-class model; 1M context, 128K max output, $10/$50 per MTok. Always-on thinking; ships with safety classifiers that fall back to Opus 4.8 on sensitive queries. Access was temporarily suspended on 2026-06-12 under a US export-control directive.
